ogTitle: Juna Downs vs Jurien Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Juna Downs and Jurien Bay.
heading: Juna Downs vs Jurien Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Juna Downs, Western Australia and Jurien Bay, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jurien Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Juna Downs (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Juna Downs or Jurien Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Juna Downs has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Jurien Bay scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Juna Downs scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Jurien Bay scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Juna Downs or Jurien Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jurien Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
